nasb.text: Penuel was the father of Gedor, and Ezer the father of Hushah. These were the sons of Hur, the firstborn of Ephrathah, the father of Bethlehem.

esv.text: and Penuel fathered Gedor, and Ezer fathered Hushah. These were the sons of Hur, the firstborn of Ephrathah, the father of Bethlehem.

cnv.text: 基多的父親是毘努伊勒；戶沙的父親是以謝珥；這些都是伯利恆的父親以法他的長子戶珥所生的。

ccb.text: 基多的父亲是毗努伊勒，户沙的父亲是以谢珥。这些人都是伯利恒的父亲、以法她的长子户珥的后代。
